calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Restitution Following Reversal And Interest Thereon
Off Calendar May-27-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PHILADELPHIA REINSURANCE CORPORATION'S Motion For Restitution Following Reversal And Interest Thereon.

Grant pursuant to plaintiff's notice of non-opposition. Parties to resolve what interest, if any, that is to be awarded by subsequent motion.

Proposed order submitted by moving party is under review.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/SRB)
